_fixture_meta.description: Growth persona exits ROKU citing stop being hit and underperformance vs. index — no change to medium-term revenue acceleration thesis.

thesis_status.reason: Stop hit at -12% from entry. ROKU has underperformed the Nasdaq by 800bps over the past month. The risk/reward no longer justifies holding.
